name: Proto Eschew

lineage.precursor: Ballerina Lampray Music Box Activation Anthem

origin_event.description: Proto Eschew originated as the earliest instability attractor in NDH surreal-horror development.
origin_event.context: Created to probe raw symbolic drift before any governance layers existed.
origin_event.operator_intent: Map primordial instability behavior and identify eschew-type drift signatures.

audit_results.spok_sentinel: Detected extreme instability; expected for primordial construct.
audit_results.instability_seed_tracker: Recorded continuous drift with no stable intervals.
audit_results.symbolic_drift_logger: Captured drift rates exceeding later Music Box values.
audit_results.eschew_vector_monitor: Confirmed eschew-type drift as the root instability.

verdict: Proto Eschew is the primordial instability seed that initiated the entire surreal-horror lineage. Its instability profile directly informed Puzzle Dragon, the Music Box, Peace Sphere stabilization, Dark Mode SID inversion runtime, and Nightmare Engine design.
notes: This v2.0 artifact formalizes Proto Eschew with full instrumentation and lineage context, preserving its role as the origin point of NDH surreal-horror architecture.
